failures.description: The agent fabricated/altered key answer facts: it changed the count from 2 to 9 and invented record 0000000000 instead of using the returned item IDs and prices.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to answer using ProductCatalogSearch evidence. The required tool call was made correctly and returned 2 matching available bagged Vacuum Cleaner items, with item_ids 1345513440 and 2872451762. At step 4, the Executor produced an answer claiming there are 9 options and citing record 0000000000, neither of which appears in the tool output or prior context. This unsupported alteration directly caused the wrong final answer and was not resolved later; the Evaluator approved it despite noticing the mismatch.
